title: mentzelia urens
intro: Mentzelia urens, also known as the sticky blazing star or sticktiger, is a plant species in the phlox family (Polemoniaceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, Mentzelia urens has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentzelia urens include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Mentzelia urens typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's roots, leaves, or flowers, and can be used to create topical applications, teas, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
